title: Knights of St. Mulumba Invests New Members in VGC Subcouncil Ceremony - FinancialEDGE
description: The Knights of St. Mulumba, VGC Subcouncil, held its 2nd Degree Investiture Ceremony at the Catholic Church of Epiphany, Ologolo, Lekki, Lagos on Saturday, January 25, 2025. The ceremony, which was attended by dignitaries and members of the Knights of St. Mulumba, marked an important milestone in the journey of the new investees. Sir Tony
html:
The Knights of St. Mulumba, VGC Subcouncil, held its 2nd Degree Investiture Ceremony at the Catholic Church of Epiphany, Ologolo, Lekki, Lagos on Saturday, January 25, 2025.

The ceremony, which was attended by dignitaries and members of the Knights of St. Mulumba, marked an important milestone in the journey of the new investees.

Sir Tony Ukairo, Grand Knight of the VGC Subcouncil, led the ceremony, which was also attended by Rev. Father Benjamin Ekpo, Parish Priest of the Catholic Church of Epiphany.

The investees, including Chuma Okeke, Valentine Omamogho, Ogoegbunam Anazodo, and Festus Okudibe, were formally invested into the Order of the Knights of St. Mulumba, marking their commitment to the values of the Order.

The Knights of St. Mulumba is a Catholic fraternal organization dedicated to promoting the values of charity, unity, and fraternity among its members.

The VGC Subcouncil is one of the many subcouncils of the Knights of St. Mulumba in Nigeria, and the ceremony marked an important step in the growth and development of the Subcouncil.
